scenarios.description: load() returns DotenvImpl with entries when systemProperties=false (branch-false) and one entry in .env
scenarios.precondition: create temp directory with .env file containing "KEY=VALUE"; use DotenvBuilder.directory(tempDir)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entriesInFile contains one entry with key="KEY", value="VALUE"; System.getProperty("KEY") remains null

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true (branch-true) and empty .env yields empty entries and no properties set (loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with empty .env; use builder.directory(tempDir).systemProperties()
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() is empty; System properties unchanged for any key
pseudocode: TEST TC02 load with systemProperties and empty file

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true (branch-true) and one entry sets exactly one system property (loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with .env containing "A=1"; use builder.directory(tempDir).systemProperties()
pseudocode: TEST TC03 load sets one system property

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true (branch-true) and multiple entries sets all system properties (loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with .env containing "X=10\nY=20"; use builder.directory(tempDir).systemProperties()
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.get("X")=="10" and .get("Y")=="20"; System.getProperty("X")=="10" and System.getProperty("Y")=="20"
pseudocode: TEST TC04 load sets multiple system properties

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env is missing with default throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir without .env; use builder.directory(tempDir)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no system properties set
pseudocode: TEST TC05 load missing file throws
